item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: The concept was extremely interesting, but the execution was a little poor in really showing off how… powerful, this entity was. The surfer dude who was interviewed, along with some of the chatter in the audio logs - the dialogue felt artificial and didn't do this article justice. No vote.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: As much as I would love to upvote a hekatonkheires SCP, I just feel that this is too underwhelming. The dialogue feels very artificial. The vague warnings about awakening evils just doesn't convey as much gravitas as I'd expect for a story about the last guardian at the gates of Tartarus desperate to prevent the titans of old from escaping.

item.title: Licensing Junior Staff Post - Info
item.content:encoded: As no source that is compliant with our license could be found for the image in this article, they have been removed. The files are still available at bottom of the page.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Well written, concise article that has enough ambiguity to make it spooky and enough description so you know what happens

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: How did Dr. blackbox go missing? Did that happen in the [DATA EXPUNGED]? Regardless, feel like expunging what happens takes away from the article more than it gives. I think the redaction of the letter works very well though.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I always knew Yoga was more sinister than it looked on the outside

+1 for a good cringey weird article
